action.reasoning: Observation: Weighted ensemble with swa.pt crashed from 0.6316→0.2569. swa.pt is corrupted/incompatible. Best was iter15: equal-weight ensemble of best.pt + clip_best.pt = 0.6316. ~15 min left. Analysis: Must revert to the working equal-weight 2-model ensemble. Decision: Rewrite predict.py with only best.pt + clip_best.pt, equal weights, submit eval immediately.
